l2_sentences: The teacher instructed the students, who were eagerly listening, to complete their assignments before the deadline.
The police officer directed the pedestrians, some of whom were tourists, to clear the intersection immediately.
The manager asked the employees, including those from the remote team, to submit their reports by Friday.
The doctor advised the patients, particularly those with chronic conditions, to monitor their symptoms closely.
The captain warned the passengers, many of whom were first-time flyers, to remain seated during the turbulence.
